channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: Capcom’s next big game explores the horrors of AI
item.description: Capcom has been on a hot streak. The Monster Hunter series became a global hit with the launch of Monster Hunter World in 2018, which became Capcom's best-selling game, while Street Fighter reinvented itself with a sixth entry and a string of Resident Evil games brought the survival horror franchise back to prominence. The most […]

item.title: World launches tool to verify humans behind AI shopping agents
item.description: As AI agents take the reins for online shoppers, Sam Altman's unconventional startup is looking to expand its verification offerings to support agentic commerce.

item.title: NYT Strands hints and answers for Wednesday, March 18 (game #745)
item.description: Looking for NYT Strands answers and hints? Here's all you need to know to solve today's game, including the spangram.

item.title: Quordle hints and answers for Wednesday, March 18 (game #1514)
item.description: Looking for Quordle clues? We can help. Plus get the answers to Quordle today and past solutions.

item.title: NYT Connections hints and answers for Wednesday, March 18 (game #1011)
item.description: Looking for NYT Connections answers and hints? Here's all you need to know to solve today's game, plus my commentary on the puzzles.

item.title: This '80s classic with undeniable chemistry' is exactly what you need to stream on Prime Video if you love Kurt Russell but hate The Madison
item.description: New Taylor Sheridan series The Madison isn't everyone's cup of tea — and this 80s classic movie on Prime Video might be a better alternative for Kurt Russell fans.

item.title: Okta unveils new framework to secure and protect enterprise AI agents
item.description: Okta's new blueprint spells out how companies can manage AI agents and includes an agent management platform, launching in April.

item.title: Pragmata is one of the most original games I've played in years, and I'm not just talking about its unique puzzle combat
item.description: Pragamata continues to wow us with its beautiful environments and intense puzzle combat in our latest hands-on session.

item.title: Philips présente ses nouveaux TV OLED+951 et OLED+911 avec Ambilight, Dolby Vision 2 Max et TitanOS
item.description: Présentés lors d’un événement européen à Berlin, les nouvelles séries de téléviseurs OLED+951 et OLED+911 viennent renouveler la gamme OLED premium de Philips. Ils embarquent une dalle WOLED de dernière génération avec technologie META 4.0, un processeur P5 AI de 10e génération, supportent le Dolby Vision 2 Max et la plate-forme TitanOS.

item.title: Verge et Donut : la moto électrique qui se recharge le plus vite au monde cache-t-elle un énorme mensonge ?
item.description: Voici la moto électrique qui se recharge le plus rapidement au monde, avec une batterie solide, révolutionnaire et inédite. Mais la vidéo de démonstration laisse un arrière goût d'amertume. Certains experts doutent de la véracité de l'existence de cette batterie.

item.title: Remember Gateway 2000? How a mouse pad triggered a wave of nostalgia for the big-box home PC company
item.description: Gateway 2000 Computers hasn't been relevant in decades, but the nostalgia is strong for the 20th-century PC maker and its iconic cow-themed boxes.

item.title: I've spent hours shopping Best Buy's Tech Fest Sale — here's every deal worth buying on TVs, AirPods, laptops, and more
item.description: Best Buy has launched a huge Tech Fest Sale, and as TechRadar's deals editor, I've spent hours shopping the sale to pick out the best offers worth buying.

item.title: 'An excellent standing desk that will last you years': Vari's ComfortEdge is one of the most comfortable desks we've ever tested and it's $179 off
item.description: Vari Electric Standing Desk with ComfortEdge is one of the most comfortable desks we've ever tested and it's 20% off.

item.title: NordVPN teams up with Internews to defend journalists and activists from digital threats
item.description: The VPN giant is expanding its efforts to provide journalists, human rights defenders, and NGOs with vital digital security tools to bypass increased censorship, digital surveillance, and cyberattacks.

item.title: ‘The real question is, are there any audio products Philips won’t be releasing in 2026?’ — I just looked at the firm’s hi-fi listings for 2026, and it’s a lot
item.description: Earbuds, wireless over-ears, retro on-ears, boombox-style speakers, a turntable, and a ‘micro hi-fi system’ — is there any audio product Philips isn’t releasing in 2026?

item.title: The best early Pokémon deals to shop ahead of Amazons Big Spring Sale
item.description: Shop early Pokémon deals before Amazon's Big Spring Sale, from TCG boxes and tins to discounted Nintendo Switch games.

item.title: YouTuber’s Hoverboard Prototype Takes Us One Step Closer to ‘Back to the Future’
item.description: Yep, people are still trying to make hoverboards happen.

item.title: PlayStation : le streaming 1080p haute qualité débarque sur le Portal
item.description: C'est décidément la journée des consoles portables. Après la grosse mise à jour de la Switch 2, c'est au tour de PlayStaton de livrer une nouvelle version du logiciel du Portal — qui n'est certes pas une « console » au même titre que celle de Nintendo — qui lui apporte, entre autres, un gain graphique bienvenu.

item.title: Dyson s’attaque enfin aux stations de vidage avec son nouveau V10 Konical
item.description: Il aura fallu attendre 2026 pour que Dyson daigne enfin s'occuper de la corvée la plus sale : vider le bac. Avec le V10 Konical, la marque britannique lance sa première station d'auto-vidage pour ne plus toucher à la poussière pendant deux mois.

item.title: Intel lance les puissants processeurs Core Ultra 7 270HX Plus et Ultra 9 290HX Plus pour PC portables
item.description: Après les nouveaux processeurs Intel dédiés au jeu sur ordinateur de bureau, voici leur déclinaison pour PC portables. Avec beaucoup plus de puissance ?

item.title: Le prix de ce TV Samsung 4K Neo QLED de 85″ et 144 Hz baisse de 300 € : un bon compromis entre image, fluidité et gaming
item.description: Le Samsung 85QN70F est un téléviseur 4K connecté avec une dalle Neo QLED Mini LED qui tire le meilleur de chaque contenu que vous souhaitez afficher. Il est à retrouver pour 1 499 euros au lieu de 1 799 euros chez Boulanger.

item.title: A PlayStation Portal update is adding a 1080p High Quality mode
item.description: Sony is rolling out a firmware update for its PlayStation Portal handheld that introduces a new quality option for both Remote Play and Cloud Streaming. Choosing the 1080p High Quality mode means that you’ll be able to stream games at a higher bitrate compared with the 1080p Standard option. You can switch to this mode by going to Quick Menu > Max Resolution and picking 1080p High Quality while you’re playing a game. You’ll need to restart your game session for the change to take effect. Naturally, 1080p High Quality will use more data than the other resolution options.Sony says that more than...

item.title: Amazon’s new ‘getitfast’ delivery page lists items you can have in 1 hour
item.description: Amazon announced on Tuesday that it's making it easier for users to find products eligible for its 1-hour and 3-hour delivery options with a new "getitfast" page for same-day delivery products available in their area. Amazon is also introducing new search filters for 1-hour and 3-hour delivery, along with tags on eligible products - which […]

item.title: L’application Xbox vous laisse ajouter des jeux et des logiciels peu importe d’où ils viennent
item.description: Après l'intégration des plateformes les plus connues comme Steam ou Epic Games Store, l'application Xbox va pouvoir accueillir presque n'importe quel jeu et programme.

item.title: Voici à quel point rouler en électrique coûte moins cher qu’en essence ou diesel
item.description: La voiture électrique est devenue le meilleur bouclier pour votre pouvoir d'achat. Chiffres à l'appui : rouler sur batterie en période de crise énergétique coûte environ 65 euros par mois, contre 142 euros pour un modèle essence équivalent. Un écart massif.

item.title: Prix du carburant : la voiture électrique fait économiser 77 euros par mois
item.description: La flambée des prix à la pompe rappelle brutalement la vulnérabilité de l'Europe face aux énergies fossiles. Selon une récente analyse, l'électrification s'impose comme un bouclier économique pour protéger le portefeuille des conducteurs et la souveraineté du continent.

item.title: Nintendo Switch 2 update adds ‘Handheld Boost Mode’ for original Switch games
item.description: Nintendo's latest update for the Switch 2 will upgrade the performance of original Switch games played in handheld mode, as reported earlier by IGN. When you turn on the new Handheld Boost Mode, the Switch 2 will force original Switch games to run as if the console is connected to a TV, allowing for better […]

item.title: Sarah Michelle Gellar Says a Single Executive Was Responsible for Killing the ‘Buffy’ Reboot
item.description: The returning star has hit out at an executive 'who was not only not a fan of the original, but was proud to constantly remind us that he had never seen the entirety of the series and how it wasn't for him.'

item.title: Why Project Hail Mary’s creators were ‘scared’ about making the sci-fi adaptation
item.description: Project Hail Mary is a natural follow-up to The Martian. Both movies are based on sci-fi novels by Andy Weir, and both have bankable stars in the lead role (Matt Damon for The Martian, Ryan Gosling for Project Hail Mary) and accomplished directors at the helm (Ridley Scott for the former, Phil Lord and Christopher […]

item.title: Stryker hackers allegedly wiped tens of thousands of devices without using any malware
item.description: They used a legitimate Microsoft service and a set of compromised credentials.

item.title: Apple and Nike team up for a new Powerbeats Pro 2 colorway
item.description: Apple and Nike are at it again. But this time, their collaboration doesn't involve Apple Watch bands or a shoe-tracking iPod. Instead, the companies are launching a new color option for Beats' fitness-focused earphones. Meet the Powerbeats Pro 2 - Nike Special Edition."This isn't just a new colorway," Beats CMI Chris Thorne wrote in a press release. "It's a collision of two brands that deﬁne performance, culture and sports — the attributes of today's athlete."Okay, cool, but marketing-speak aside, this is, in fact, just a new colorway. However, depending on your taste, it might be one you're i...

item.title: The second generation of Boox Go 10.3 e-ink tablet is finally here
item.description: As of March 17, Boox released the Go 10.3 (Gen II) e-ink tablet. The new models are exceptionally thin and lightweight, with one model now featuring an added front light. The devices now come with Android 15 and start at $419.99.

item.title: Assassin’s Creed fans have been burned by a terrible adaptation before, but Netflix’s cast announcement has filled me with renewed hope
item.description: Netflix's Assassin's Creed cast announcement has got me feeling optimistic about the upcoming series.

item.title: You save nearly 80% on two months of Paramount Plus Premium with this excellent deal right now
item.description: You save nearly 80% on two months of Paramount Plus Premium with this excellent deal running right now.

item.title: Krispy Kreme is giving away free green doughnuts for St. Patricks Day — how to claim yours today
item.description: Krispy Kreme is giving away free Green O'riginal Glazed doughnut. No purchase is necessary, and the offer is good in-shop or drive-thru.

item.title: La Fédération Française de Rugby a été piratée : 530 000 personnes seraient concernées
item.description: Coup dur pour l'instance en charge du rugby dans l'Hexagone. Une base de données de la FFR serait actuellement en vente sur le Dark Web. De nombreuses données privées s'y trouvent.

item.title: St. Patrick’s Day 2026 deals: Score free food from Krispy Kreme, 7-Eleven, Burger King, and more
item.description: The best St. Patrick's Day 2026 deals. Get free food from Krispy Kreme, 7-Eleven, Burger King, and more.

item.title: WhatsApp débarque enfin sur les montres connectées Garmin et ça change tout
item.description: Garmin a annoncé l'arrivée d'un nouvel acteur de poids sur ses montres connectées : WhatsApp. Désormais, les possesseurs de montres de sport de la marque américaine pourront recevoir et répondre à leurs messages directement depuis le poignet.

item.title: Transporter sa poussette YOYO à vélo : la solution géniale et inédite de cette marque française de cargo électrique
item.description: La jeune marque française Gaya dévoile un accessoire inédit permettant de transporter une poussette YOYO à l’avant de ses vélos électriques.

item.title: Game Pass en mars 2026 : Resident Evil 7, Like a Dragon, Disco Elysium, Expedition 33… Voici la deuxième vague de jeux du mois
item.description: Microsoft frappe fort avec les premières sorties de mars sur le Game Pass ! Outre les récents Hollow Knight : Silksong et Kingdom Come : Deliverance II, Cyberpunk 2077 arrive également sur console et sur le cloud.

item.title: Immersive sound, awesome battery life, and karaoke functionality for good measure — Marshall just scored a second hit with its latest party speaker
item.description: I tested Marshall’s second party speaker, and it may be smaller, but my word does it pack a punch — here’s how I rated it.

item.title: 'More people can keep their private conversations going right from their wrist' as Garmin works with Meta to add WhatsApp integration to 'select' watches
item.description: Garmin continues to move from training tool to 'proper' smartwatch with a new WhatsApp integration.

item.title: Nvidia invente le filtre de beauté Instagram pour les jeux vidéo : les joueurs détestent
item.description: Nvidia ne s'attendait probablement pas à ce que la présentation du DLSS 5 fasse autant polémique. Il faut dire que la nouvelle technologie d'upscaling transforme en profondeur les graphismes des jeux vidéo avec l'aide d'une IA particulièrement agressive. Résultat : beaucoup de joueurs craignent que leurs jeux soient complètement dénaturés par cette IA digne d'un mauvais filtre Instagram....

item.title: Forget the MacBook Neo: I found three Windows 11 laptops under $600 that beat Apple's new machine on specs, performance and price
item.description: Dell, HP and Lenovo models all offer double the memory and storage - and offer far greater value for money.

item.title: 'We've got 12 months of orders' — Ricoh's niche black and white-only compact is a hit, despite the price hike
item.description: Ricoh's first black and white-only compact, the GR IV Monochrome, is giving Ricoh a welcome headache, with demand outstripping supply.

item.title: Audi officialise l’A2 e-tron électrique : un design inédit avec les moteurs et batteries éprouvés de Volkswagen
item.description: Audi officialise l'existence de l'A2 e-tron, sa future voiture électrique compacte. Et on connaît déjà de nombreuses caractéristiques techniques, comme les moteurs ou les batteries, grâce à ses cousines chez Volkswagen et Cupra.

item.title: Philips’ new cheap Dolby Atmos soundbar with 4K 120Hz HDMI passthrough could be the perfect upgrade for older gaming TVs
item.description: Philips has unveiled three new mid-range soundbars, one of which features 4K 120Hz passthrough that'll be useful for gamers

item.title: Self-Balancing Bikes From the ‘Tesla of Motorcycles’ Are Ready for Production
item.description: OMOWAY's wants to assuage your worst fears with its tricked out bikes.

item.title: Une puce AMD Zen 6 aperçue pour la toute première fois en ligne : ce qu’elle nous apprend
item.description: Pour la première fois, un processeur AMD Zen 6 a été aperçu en ligne suite à son passage sur Geekbench. Si les résultats de cette nouvelle puce en benchmarks sont peu évocateurs, les informations qu'elle égrène derrière elle sont, pour leur part, intéressantes.

item.title: MacBook Neo, AirPods Max 2, iPhone 17e, and everything else Apple announced this month
item.description: From a new iPhone to a budget-friendly MacBook, Apple announced a series of new products this week.

item.title: A Clever Software Patch Gave This Ice Satellite a Wild New Trick
item.description: A software upgrade allowed CryoSat to monitor disturbances caused by a geomagnetic storm.

item.title: Apple va vous faire attendre 2028 pour cette fonction basique sur ses iPhone abordables
item.description: À quand le 120 Hz sur les iPhone abordables de série « e » ? Un média spécialisé coréen est cette semaine porteur de bien mauvaises nouvelles en la matière, estimant que ce changement n'interviendrait pas avant l'iPhone 19e... à l'horizon 2028.

item.title: Oppo’s Find N6 might be the foldable of your dreams
item.description: Oppo is back with another high-spec foldable phone you may never see outside a tech journalist's hands. The Find N6 is its new, sub-9mm device that is headed to Asian markets and, for now, not many other places. That means no US or European availability. So why write about it? With its build quality, hardware specs and camera array, not only is it a very good phone, but it's also proof that another device maker can go toe-to-toe with Samsung’s dominance in flagship foldable phones. Hardware Image by Mat Smith for Engadget Oppo is obsessed with the foldable crease. More than me, more than most ...

item.title: The best AirPods deals to shop ahead of Amazons Big Spring Sale — save on AirPods 4 and AirPods Pro 3
item.description: The best early AirPods deals to shop before Amazon's Big Spring Sale 2026 officially kicks off. Save on AirPods 4 and AirPods Pro 3.

item.title: Puissants, endurants et pas trop chers : voici les Poco X8 Pro et Poco X8 Pro Max
item.description: Xiaomi lance deux nouveaux smartphones : les Poco X8 Pro et Poco X8 Pro Max. Une fois n'est pas coutume, la puissance et la batterie sont à l'honneur.

item.title: Amazon will now ship some products to you in 1 hour. But boy, will it cost you
item.description: The e-commerce giant is launching super-fast delivery service in select cities and towns across the United States. Be prepared for sticker shock. We’ve all been there: You need something at this exact moment—maybe toilet paper, staples, or ibuprofen—but you also can’t be bothered to run out to the local store for it.

item.title: Philips’ new OLED TVs are the world’s first with Dolby Vision 2 — and I'm so excited for the follow-up to the model I called ‘best value on the market’
item.description: Philips has revealed its 2026 OLED lineup, featuring higher brightness, Dolby Vision 2 support and a new Amiblight feature!
